title: Manage water systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage water systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess soil and water resources for crop and plant type

pcs.text: Identify suitability of soil and water resources for irrigation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify suitability of soil and water resources for irrigation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify suitability of soil and water resources for irrigation.

pcs.text: Determine range of crops and plant types that could be grown in soil utilising available water resources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine range of crops and plant types that could be grown in soil utilising available water resources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine range of crops and plant types that could be grown in soil utilising available water resources.

pcs.text: Select crop and/or plant type based on assessment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select crop and/or plant type based on assessment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select crop and/or plant type based on assessment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess soil and water resources for crop and plant type

elements.title: Determine the feasibility of using or up-grading irrigation system

pcs.text: Assess water resources and drainage implications to determine suitability for irrigation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess water resources and drainage implications to determine suitability for irrigation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess water resources and drainage implications to determine suitability for irrigation.

pcs.text: Determine water quality and treatment requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine water quality and treatment requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine water quality and treatment requirements.

pcs.text: Determine water requirements and most suitable application systems for each crop and plant type and area, and for each soil type
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine water requirements and most suitable application systems for each crop and plant type and area, and for each soil type?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine water requirements and most suitable application systems for each crop and plant type and area, and for each soil type.

pcs.text: Determine other water requirements, such as climate control
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine other water requirements, such as climate control?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine other water requirements, such as climate control.

pcs.text: Determine drainage requirements in relation to each soil and crop and plant type and type of irrigation system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine drainage requirements in relation to each soil and crop and plant type and type of irrigation system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine drainage requirements in relation to each soil and crop and plant type and type of irrigation system.

pcs.text: Assess performance data, audit reports, environmental and workplace health and safety data for existing systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess performance data, audit reports, environmental and workplace health and safety data for existing systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess performance data, audit reports, environmental and workplace health and safety data for existing systems.

pcs.text: Obtain information from irrigation specialists on all relevant aspects of irrigation design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain information from irrigation specialists on all relevant aspects of irrigation design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain information from irrigation specialists on all relevant aspects of irrigation design.

pcs.text: Assess and cost available irrigation system types and components and make a decision on the particular system to be used or upgrades to existing system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and cost available irrigation system types and components and make a decision on the particular system to be used or upgrades to existing system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and cost available irrigation system types and components and make a decision on the particular system to be used or upgrades to existing system.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine the feasibility of using or up-grading irrigation system

elements.title: Install or maintain an irrigation or drainage system

pcs.text: Determine and acquire materials and equipment making up the system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and acquire materials and equipment making up the system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and acquire materials and equipment making up the system.

pcs.text: Install irrigation system using advice, as necessary, from irrigation specialists
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install irrigation system using advice, as necessary, from irrigation specialists?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install irrigation system using advice, as necessary, from irrigation specialists.

pcs.text: Check that irrigation and drainage systems are supervised to ensure there are no leaks or blockages
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check that irrigation and drainage systems are supervised to ensure there are no leaks or blockages?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check that irrigation and drainage systems are supervised to ensure there are no leaks or blockages.

pcs.text: Confirm that the water is being evenly distributed and that the drainage is effective and the system is in good working order
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm that the water is being evenly distributed and that the drainage is effective and the system is in good working order?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm that the water is being evenly distributed and that the drainage is effective and the system is in good working order.

pcs.text: Assess the need for water inputs at critical growth stages
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the need for water inputs at critical growth stages?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the need for water inputs at critical growth stages.

pcs.text: Consider crop value and induce appropriate water regimes including frost protection where appropriate
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider crop value and induce appropriate water regimes including frost protection where appropriate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider crop value and induce appropriate water regimes including frost protection where appropriate.

pcs.text: Utilise soil moisture monitoring data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Utilise soil moisture monitoring data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Utilise soil moisture monitoring data.

pcs.text: Consider weather forecast, seasonal weather outlook, water allocations and water quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider weather forecast, seasonal weather outlook, water allocations and water quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider weather forecast, seasonal weather outlook, water allocations and water quality.

pcs.text: Consider energy costs in water application timing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider energy costs in water application timing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider energy costs in water application timing.

pcs.text: Identify volume and quality of water flow
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify volume and quality of water flow?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify volume and quality of water flow.

pcs.text: Plan scheduled irrigation system maintenance work to ensure minimised disruption to watering activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan scheduled irrigation system maintenance work to ensure minimised disruption to watering activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan scheduled irrigation system maintenance work to ensure minimised disruption to watering activities.

pcs.text: Monitor plant response to irrigation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor plant response to irrigation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor plant response to irrigation.

pcs.text: Modify irrigation scheduling to minimise water wastage and maximise outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Modify irrigation scheduling to minimise water wastage and maximise outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Modify irrigation scheduling to minimise water wastage and maximise outcomes.

pcs.text: Record irrigation system water usage according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record irrigation system water usage according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record irrigation system water usage according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Determine and value plant growth, crop quality and yield from irrigation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and value plant growth, crop quality and yield from irrigation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and value plant growth, crop quality and yield from irrigation.

pcs.text: Calculate the cost of irrigation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate the cost of irrigation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate the cost of irrigation.

pcs.text: Identify and minimise poor water usage practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and minimise poor water usage practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and minimise poor water usage practices.

pcs.text: Determine the cost benefit of irrigation and compare with alternative systems and approaches
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the cost benefit of irrigation and compare with alternative systems and approaches?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the cost benefit of irrigation and compare with alternative systems and approaches.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
